# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1
kind: Linkerd
metadata:
  name: zerotrust-mesh
spec:
  enablePrometheus: true
  enableTracing: true
  enableDash: true

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-access-rules
spec:
  rules:
    - match:
        kinds:
          - apiGroups: ["*"]
            kinds: ["*"]
        namespacesSelector:
          matchExpressions:
            - key: linkerd.io/createdBy
              operator: In
              values:
                - app-1
                - app-2
        ports:
          - min: 80
            max: 80
    - match:
        kinds:
          - apiGroups: ["*"]
            kinds: ["*"]
        namespacesSelector:
          matchExpressions:
            - key: linkerd.io/createdBy
              operator: In
              values:
                - app-2
        ports:
          - min: 8080
            max: 8080
    - match:
        kinds:
          - apiGroups: ["*"]
            kinds: ["*"]
        namespacesSelector:
          matchExpressions:
            - key: linkerd.io/createdBy
              operator: In
              values:
                - app-1
        ports:
          - min: 8081
            max: 8081
